top_signals.title: ‘In the shadow of geopolitics and AI’: Bitcoin hovers near cycle lows as ETF outflows and rate fears deepen worst stretch of 2026
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin trades near $61,000 as geopolitics, inflation fears, and ETF outflows weigh on markets amid debate over a possible bottom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: CISA Admin Leaked AWS GovCloud Keys on Github
top_signals.summary: Until this past weekend, a contractor for the Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) maintained a public GitHub repository that exposed credentials to several highly privileged AWS GovCloud accounts and a large number of internal CISA systems. Security experts said the public archive included files detailing how CISA builds, tests and deploys software internally, and that it represents one of the most egregious government data leaks in recent history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Anthropic considera peligroso a Mythos. ¿Por qué amplía su acceso?
top_signals.summary: ¿Qué tan peligrosa debe ser una inteligencia artificial para que su creador se niegue a lanzarla al público, pero al mismo tiempo amplíe su acceso? Anthropic asegura que su modelo Mythos puede descubrir vulnerabilidades críticas y facilitar ciberataques sofisticados. Entonces, ¿por qué cada vez más organizaciones pueden usarlo? (Source: Bloomberg)

Wasting China’s solar panel surplus is madness - Financial Times

top_signals.title: UK weakens proposed telecoms defenses against Chinese hackers after industry pushback
top_signals.summary: Britain has weakened proposed cybersecurity protections for its telecoms networks that were developed in response to the Salt Typhoon espionage campaign, after the companies responsible for implementing the measures lobbied against them.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
